title: Fortnite Marking
description: Adds marks and danger marks from fortnite.
body:
# Adds marks from fortnite.

## Features
### Customizable marks 🎨
Choose one of 12 colors.
### Danger mark ⚠️
Put it... if you want to mark the danger to your friends.
### Singleplayer and Multiplayer support 👥
Mod supports single playing and playing with friends!

## Keybinds 🎮
Press **R** to put mark

Press **U** to put danger mark

Press **I** to open settings menu
